title: Earthworks
reference: DPWH Blue Book logic, project plans, geotechnical report, and approved special provisions.

clauses.scope: This work covers excavation, backfilling, grading, disposal of unsuitable materials, compaction, and all incidental earthworks required by the contract documents.
materials: Use approved fill and backfill materials free from organic matter and other deleterious substances.
Moisture conditioning water shall be clean and adequate for compaction control.
execution: Establish grades, limits, and elevations before commencing work.
Excavate only within approved limits and protect adjacent utilities and structures.
Place fill in layers and compact each layer to the required density.
testing: Perform field density tests as required.
Verify soil classification and compaction characteristics when required by the project.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be based on accepted quantity by volume or by the relevant BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include excavation, hauling, disposal, filling, compaction, testing, labor, equipment, and incidental work.

title: Structural Concrete
reference: DPWH structural concrete logic, approved structural drawings, mix design, and applicable Philippine codes.

clauses.scope: This work covers furnishing, mixing, placing, finishing, curing, and protecting structural concrete for all reinforced or plain concrete members indicated on the plans.
materials: Use cement, aggregates, and water suitable for the specified concrete strength.
Admixtures, if used, shall be subject to approval and compatibility with the mix design.
execution: Do not place concrete until formwork, reinforcement, and embedded items have been inspected and accepted.
Place and consolidate concrete properly to avoid segregation and honeycombing.
Provide curing and protection immediately after finishing.
testing: Perform slump tests during concrete delivery or placement as required.
Take compressive strength samples and test concrete cylinders in accordance with the project requirements.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted cubic meter or by the corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include batching, transport, placement, consolidation, finishing, curing, testing, labor, equipment, and incidentals.

title: Reinforcing Steel
reference: DPWH reinforcing steel logic, approved bar bending schedules, and structural drawings.

clauses.scope: This work covers furnishing, cutting, bending, placing, tying, and securing reinforcing steel for concrete construction.
materials: Use reinforcing bars of the size, grade, and type indicated on the plans.
Provide tie wire, spacers, chairs, and supports necessary for correct placement.
execution: Prepare bars in accordance with approved bar bending schedules.
Maintain spacing, laps, hooks, cover, and anchorage required by the drawings and applicable code provisions.
Keep reinforcement clean enough to ensure proper bond with concrete.
testing: Provide mill certificates and laboratory verification where required.
Inspect spacing, cover, laps, and bar arrangement prior to concreting.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted kilogram, ton, or by the corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include cutting, bending, placing, tying, supports, labor, tools, and incidental work.

title: Concrete Hollow Block Masonry
reference: DPWH and project masonry logic, approved drawings, and relevant Philippine standards.

clauses.scope: This work covers furnishing and laying masonry units, mortar, reinforcement, grout, and accessories necessary for complete masonry construction.
materials: Use masonry units of approved type, size, and quality.
Mortar and grout materials shall be suitable for the specified wall assembly.
execution: Lay masonry true to line, level, and plumb with uniform joints.
Install reinforcement, dowels, and grout where indicated.
Protect masonry from damage and excessive drying during construction.
testing: Inspect alignment, jointing, reinforcement placement, and grout filling.
Verify masonry unit strength where required by the project.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted square meter, cubic meter, or corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include blocks, mortar, grout, reinforcement, labor, tools, scaffolding, and incidentals.

title: Painting Works
reference: Project finish schedules, approved product data, and DPWH-style finish requirements.

clauses.scope: This work covers surface preparation and application of primer, intermediate, and finish coats as required for the indicated substrate and finish system.
materials: Use approved paint materials compatible with the substrate and specified finish.
Store paint products in original unopened containers until use.
execution: Apply the required number of coats with proper drying time between coats.
Protect adjacent surfaces from splatter and staining.
testing: Inspect color consistency, coverage, and finish uniformity.
clauses.measurement: Measurement shall be by accepted area or by corresponding BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include surface preparation, priming, painting, labor, tools, and incidentals.
